title: Jesus wept. Jesus flipped tables.
caption:
Jesus wept. Jesus flipped tables.

A godly man knows which one the moment calls for, and it's rarely the one aimed at himself.

Matthew 7: don't point at the speck in his eye while you're hauling a plank in yours. Most men flip this. Sharp with everyone else, soft on the sin they haven't dealt with.

Galatians 6:1: restore a brother gently, watching yourself so you're not tempted too. Gently. Not from a pedestal.

High standard for you. Wide-open mercy for him.

Save this for the next time you're tempted to correct someone before you've corrected yourself.

#faith #grace #christianmen #humility #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
